content.en:
Subsequently, Ye Tian found a position and began to study the one-ninth incomplete immeasurable diagram.

As for why the Blood Ancestor and the Star Sea Ancestor didn't have a conflict, he also learned from the conversation just now.

It turned out that the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea had just entered here, and it was true that a conflict broke out with the Great Ancestor of the Blood, but as soon as he made his move, he was suppressed by the Ruins Stone Tower, and he was almost kicked out.

After that, the Xinghai Great Ancestor didn't do anything.

After all, for the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea, the benefits of the Ruined Stone Tower should not be underestimated.

Maybe the rewards of the first few tiers are average, but after entering more layers, the benefits will increase, and maybe he can get resources that will greatly help his strength.

Therefore, he did not want to leave now.

......

With the passage of time, there are more and more high-level immeasurable lifeforms entering the third layer of the Relic Stone Tower, but there is not a single high-level immeasurable lifeform entering the fourth layer of the Relic Stone Tower.

After all, the time for the ruin stone tower to appear is still very short, so many great ancestors have not perfected the incomplete immeasurable map to the extent that it meets the standards of the ruin stone tower.

"This immeasurable diagram is too mysterious, and it is too difficult to perfect!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Even if it is a high-level immeasurable lifeform in the third stage, it is almost impossible to perfect this one-ninth incomplete immeasurable diagram, at most a little bit of perfection.

Relying on the little bit of perfection of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and the collection of the results of the perfection of many high-level immeasurable lifeforms, there is finally hope to completely perfect an immeasurable graph.

Of course, the premise is that the force obtains the inheritance of the Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram, and can freely give the high-level immeasurable lifeforms under its command to comprehend and improve.

And the relict stone tower, which is a constrained and incomplete immeasurable map, has no way to communicate with each other, and naturally there is no way to gather the research results of many high-level immeasurable life forms.

However, it is really possible for the ruins stone tower to give birth to a complete immeasurable map.

All it takes is a high-level immeasurable lifeform to come here to perfect the immeasurable map, and there will always be a day when it will be completely perfected.

Maybe when the ruins stone tower is perfected, I'm afraid that there will be an incomparably powerful existence here to snatch it, and it is possible to directly attack the ruins stone tower.

After all, there are many examples of ruins being occupied, and some powerful forces in the Xuanqi Territory even use ruins as their headquarters!

"These are too far away from me, so let's improve this incomplete immeasurable diagram first, and strive to completely perfect this one-ninth incomplete immeasurable diagram!" Ye Tian said darkly.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was also at a loss in the face of this incomplete immeasurable diagram, and he didn't know how to improve it at all, but gradually, he realized a little something, and he also had a little understanding.

As he realized more and more, he gradually had a direction.

But even if you have a direction, it is very difficult to study a little mystery.

this day.

Ye Tian finally realized that even if he was to slowly comprehend it by himself, he would never be able to completely perfect this one-ninth incomplete immeasurable diagram, let alone completely perfect the entire immeasurable diagram.

If he wants to perfect this immeasurable map on his own, there is only one way.

"Defy the law!"

The so-called method of testing by example means that he cultivates this immeasurable diagram, finds out the defects in it through practice, and then improves it step by step, so that the efficiency of perfection is increased by I don't know how many times.

However, the consequences of one-ninth of the immeasurable diagram of cultivation are so serious that they will simply turn the body into a thousand holes.

Any powerful high-level immeasurable lifeform would not dare to do this, even if he found some weak Great Ancestors and asked them to cultivate, there was no way to find out the flaws in them, and naturally there was no way to improve them.

"Even the top forces can't get a group of high-level immeasurable lifeforms to sacrifice themselves to perfect the immeasurable map, so they can't use this method, but I can use this method!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Anyway, his replica body is destroyed, and it is okay to copy it again, and he is not afraid of sacrifice at all.

"Let's use this method!"

Ye Tian decided.

Of course, it was impossible for his research to be carried out here, otherwise he would not be able to hide himself under the attention of many high-level immeasurable life forms.

So, Ye Tian conducted research in the Silent Black Sea.

......

Truncate the skytower.

Ye Tian copied his body to practice the immeasurable diagram, and then found out the problem step by step, and then spread and perfected.

Since there is only one-ninth of the immeasurable diagram, only a part of the immeasurable body can be cultivated for research.

It didn't take long for his replicating body to have a big problem, and it was an irreversible root problem.

"The Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram really can't be cultivated, if others cultivate, even if they are just getting started, it will be useless!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

After that, he continued to practice, and after completely discarding the duplicate body, he continued to copy another duplicate body and began to practice again.

In this way, Ye Tian sacrificed a replica body for research, and what he lost was only some energy resources for replicating the body, and he was not short of resources, so this loss was still within the scope of bearing.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to be able to perfect a little bit of the incomplete immeasurable diagram.

If it is used to enter the fourth layer, it should be more than enough.

However, Ye Tian did not show it, but continued to study and improve, he wanted to completely improve this one-ninth incomplete immeasurable diagram, so that the benefits obtained were not only more, but also beneficial to himself.

Suddenly.

One of the Great Ancestors exclaimed: "The Great Ancestor of the Raccoon Blood has perfected the Infinite Diagram to meet the standard, and has gone to the fourth layer!"

"I saw it too, and he also got a very valuable Sumeru Holy Gold!"

"Although the Blood Ancestor is very hateful, I have to admit that his comprehension is really good, and he has entered the fourth layer so quickly. "

One by one, the Great Ancestor discussed, which made the Great Ancestor of the Sea of the Sea very unhappy.

Although he entered here one step later, even if he was given a little more time, he still wouldn't be able to enter the fourth layer.

He estimated that he would have to take a long time, and that was the gap.

Of course.

In terms of strength, he is naturally not afraid of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, and he is absolutely sure that he will inflict heavy damage or even kill the Raccoon Blood Ancestor!

In the blink of an eye, another period of time has passed.

On this day, the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea also entered the fourth layer.

As time passed, one Great Ancestor after another went to the fourth layer.

At this time, some Great Ancestors found that the incomplete immeasurable diagram in the immeasurable will became more and more illusory, if it still could not be perfected, there was no progress at all, and the incomplete immeasurable diagram would disappear.

When the time comes, they will be disqualified, and they are afraid that they will be kicked out directly.
